title: Instrument chypriote AVEC tampon arrivé le 30 oct 19980 de l'ambassade de France
text_preview: REPUBLIC OF CYPRUS MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS No.485/794 VERBALE The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Cyprus presents its compliments to the Embassy of France and has the honour to refer to the Frotocole Financier signed in Paris on the 29th August 1980 and to inform the Embassy that all the necessary requirements for the entry into force of the said Protocole have been completed by the Government of…

pages.text:
REPUBLIC

OF CYPRUS

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

No.485/794

VERBALE

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of

Cyprus presents its compliments to the Embassy of France and has the honour to refer to the Frotocole Financier signed in Paris on the 29th August 1980 and to inform the

Embassy that all the necessary requirements for the entry into force of the said Protocole have been completed by the

Government of Cyprus.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of

Cyprus avails itself of this opportunits to renew to the

Embasay of France the assurances of Ita highest consideration.

Nicosia, 27 October 1980

The Embassy of France

Nicosie.

^!!. vE 1030-10-801 to 75

K 13147
